Hero.description: Passionate developer committed to high-quality work. My focus is on scalability, clean code, and continuous improvement. I am always looking for new learning opportunities to challenge myself and elevate my skills.

Experience.title: EXPERIENCE
Experience.comingSoon: Shall we add your project to the list?

items.description: Implementation of a CRM for the complete management of the company's activity, from scratch with multiple modules developed such as clock-in with geolocation, connection with external API to obtain service contracts of interest to the company, etc.
Development and maintenance of the company's CRM, where various modules were carried out such as real-time inventory, assigned tasks, etc.
Various activities such as the development of a website for an exhibition by Alonso Quesada or Data Scraping from different sources to obtain relevant information for the company.

items.name: K'7 CafesApp
items.description: A web app focused on the digitization of school cafeterias, improving worker productivity and student experience.

items.name: LU(G)AR GESTIÓN CULTURAL CRM
items.description: Development of a CRM for the complete management of the company's activity, built from scratch with multiple modules developed such as clock-in with geolocation, connection with external API to obtain interesting service contracts for the company, etc.

items.name: D'Agenda
items.description: A web app that functions as a virtual planner, with a classic reminders and notifications system since not all people adapt to those implemented by modern systems.

items.name: Iker Hernández Santana - Portfolio
items.description: Portfolio built with React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS and Vite. In addition to having the functionality to switch between English and Spanish.
